en-GB.name: Just Brown Noise
en-GB.summary: Play brown noise to help you sleep, focus, or relax.
en-GB.description: Just Brown Noise plays continuous brown noise with no interruptions. Brown noise is a deep, low-frequency sound often compared to a strong wind or a rushing river. Simply say 'Alexa, open just brown noise' and it starts playing immediately. Stop it any time by saying 'Alexa, stop'. Works with Alexa's built-in sleep timer — just say 'Alexa, set a sleep timer for 45 minutes'.
